utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What all this about you guys fighting ? ! Is this really over a room ? ! I mean , that is so silly !

emotion_cause.span: 1_What all this about you guys fighting ? ! Is this really over a room ? ! I mean , that is so silly !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ross , we can handle this .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , apparently not , and I can not just stand by and watch two people I care about very much be hurt over something that is so silly .

emotion_cause.span: 3_two people I care about very much be hurt over something that is so silly .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , enough of the silliness !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , why do not you tell her to stop being silly !

emotion_cause.span: 5_why do not you tell her to stop being silly !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay ... okay !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Two very good points , look I have known you both a long time , and I have never seen either of you one/millionth as happy as you have been since you have got together .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Do you really want to throw that all away over a room ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_Do you really want to throw that all away over a room ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is so silly .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now wh ... what is more important , love or silliness ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , we are fond of the silliness , but we also have a soft spot for the love .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Love is the best medicine .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is laughter .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why do you do it ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I do not know .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay ! All right ! Now , Chandler you ... you wanna live with Monica , right ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , I do .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And Mon , you wanna live with Chandler , do not you ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yes .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Good ! A verbal contract is binding in the state of New York !
